relationship: Son of Duke Huan, mother Zheng Ji
reign_events: Enthroned by Song army; 6th year attacked Song; 7th year Duke Wen of Jin enthroned

relationship: Son of Duke Huan, mother Ge Ying
reign_events: Killed Duke Xiao's son with help of Wei prince Kaifang; 1st year Jin defeated Chu at Chengpu

relationship: Son of Duke Huan, mother Mi Ji
fate: Assassinated by Bing Rong and Yong Zhi - he had cut off Bing Rong's father's foot and taken Yong Zhi's wife

relationship: Son of Duke Huan, mother Younger Wei Ji
reign_events: Welcomed from Wei; 2nd year Changdi came, killed by Wangzi Chengfu; Cui Zhu fled to Wei
6th year Xi Ke of Jin insulted, later led 800 chariots against Qi; Battle of An (鞍); Qi returned Lu and Wei's territory; relaxed hunting parks, reduced taxes, relieved the poor
19th year made son Guang crown prince; later replaced with Ya due to Rong Ji's influence; Cui Zhu restored Guang as Duke Zhuang

fate: Killed by Cui Zhu for affair with Cui's wife

relationship: Half-brother of Duke Zhuang, mother daughter of Lu Shusun Xuanbo
reign_events: Cui Zhu and Qing Feng as chancellors; later Tian family rose; Yan Ying served; 32nd year comet appeared; 48th year met Confucius at Jiagu

relationship: Youngest son of Duke Jing, mother Rui Ji

reign_events: Tian Chang as chancellor, controlled all Qi government

fate: Moved to seaside by Tian He; Lü clan's sacrifices ended
